meaning: vt.焚香,用香熏,(作为宗教仪式)燃香
examples: According to HP Labs, CeNSE sensors will enable real-time data collection, analysis and better decision making.
I breathe in the sweet fragrance of in-cense, and walk forward into a mist of smoke, a world beyond and within the everyday.
Based on as many as a million sensors, CENSE will make it possible to create a far clearer picture of oil and gas reservoirs than previously possible.
